text:
First, note that in 1660, time zones did not exist in the modern sense.  
But for the purpose of this exercise, we treat it as if modern time zone offsets apply historically.

Asia/Kolkata is UTC+5:30.  
Europe/London in November is UTC+0 (no DST in 1660).  
So Kolkata is 5 hours 30 minutes ahead of London.

4:00 + 5:30 = 9:30 on the same date.

FINAL_ANSWER: 1660-11-20 09:30
